cases.prompt: check if the Codi docs are up to date
expectations: Reports which generated sections are stale (if any)
Does NOT modify docs without user approval
Lists which of the 20 generated sections were updated
Flags any prose sections that may need manual review

cases.description: Pre-release doc sweep triggers the skill
cases.prompt: we're cutting a release — do the docs sweep
expectations: Reviews recent git log for schema/flag/adapter/template changes
Proposes targeted prose edits (does NOT rewrite whole files)
Scans for broken relative links before declaring done

cases.description: Consumer project docs do NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: write a README for my new feature
expectations: Does NOT touch Codi's own docs/

cases.description: Branded report request does NOT trigger this skill
cases.prompt: generate a branded case-study PDF for our client deliverable
